ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function of the signal */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the signal (e.g., Power, Data) */,
  "active_level" TEXT /* Active level of the signal (e.g., High, Low) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the signal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the signal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the signal was last updated */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer who created the signal */,
  "last_tested" TEXT /* Date the signal was last tested */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the last test (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the signal (e.g., Power, Input, Output) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "designer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the designer belongs to */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Indicates if the designer is a team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a signal */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the signal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the version */,
  "is_current" TEXT /* Indicates if this is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_versions_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal dependency */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal that depends on another signal */,
  "dependent_signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., functional, timing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "dependency_level" TEXT /* Level of dependency (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_dependencies_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_dependencies_dependent_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal interaction */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal that interacts with another signal */,
  "interacting_signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., synchronization, data transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "interaction_level" TEXT /* Level of interaction (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_interactions_interacting_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("interacting_signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_interactions_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "tested_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who conducted the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was conducted (e.g., Lab, Production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_tests_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the comment is related to */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commented_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., General, Issue, Suggestion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_comments_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the document is related to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., schematic, datasheet) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the document was uploaded */,
  "document_format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_documents_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state (e.g., Design, Testing, Approved) */,
  "state_description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "state_start_date" TEXT /* Date the signal entered this state */,
  "state_end_date" TEXT /* Date the signal left this state */,
  "state_assigned_to" TEXT /* Name of the user assigned to this state */,
  "state_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the state (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_states_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Update, Delete, Insert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_history_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who approved the signal */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the signal was approved */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., Approved, Rejected) */,
  "approval_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the approver */,
  "approval_level" TEXT /* Level of approval (e.g., Design, Testing, Production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_approvals_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "issue_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., Open, Resolved) */,
  "issue_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who reported the issue */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was reported */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who resolved the issue */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "issue_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_issues_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Voltage, Current) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., V, A) */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was measured */,
  "measured_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who measured the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., Input, Output) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_metrics_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, tester, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Indicates if the user is a team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "access_start_date" TEXT /* Date the access permission starts */,
  "access_end_date" TEXT /* Date the access permission ends */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Temporary, Permanent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, edit, test) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Level of activity (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_lead FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  "member_role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., designer, tester) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
